mapper.sql: rt.id, rt.app_id, rt.version_id, rt.target_type, rt.title, rt.status, rt.priority, rt.submit_reason, rt.review_comment, rt.reviewer_id, rt.submitted_by, rt.submitted_at, rt.reviewed_at, rt.created_at, rt.updated_at, a.name AS app_name, av.version_name AS version_name
LEFT JOIN apps a ON a.id = rt.app_id LEFT JOIN app_versions av ON av.id = rt.version_id

where.if: AND (rt.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_tasks (app_id, version_id, target_type, title, status, priority, submit_reason, review_comment, reviewer_id, submitted_by, submitted_at, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{appId}, #{versionId}, #{targetType}, #{title}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{submitReason}, #{reviewComment}, #{reviewerId}, #{submittedBy}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO review_histories (task_id, action, from_status, to_status, operator_id, comment, created_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{action}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operatorId}, #{comment}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM review_tasks rt
ORDER BY rt.priority DESC, rt.created_at DESC, rt.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM review_tasks rt
WHERE rt.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, task_id, action, from_status, to_status, operator_id, comment, created_at FROM review_histories WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE review_tasks SET reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0 AND reviewer_id IS NULL

UPDATE review_tasks SET status = #{status}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (0, 1)
